title: gibasis schiedeana
intro: Gibasis schiedeana, also known as Mexican honeysuckle or yellow coreopsis, is a perennial herb belonging to the Acanthaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Gibasis schiedeana include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
